title: Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence
content:
Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence (MSc AI)
Duration: 2 years
School: School of Science and Technology
Requirements: Bachelor's degree in CS/IT with merit
Fees: K 25,000 per year

Core Courses: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision
Career: AI Engineer, Data Scientist, ML Researcher

title: International Student Scholarship Information
content:
Mulungushi University International Student Scholarships

Available Scholarships:
1. Merit Scholarship: 50% tuition waiver for outstanding academics
2. Sports Scholarship: 25% tuition waiver for national athletes
3. Need-based Scholarship: Up to 100% for demonstrated financial need

Application Deadline: October 31st annually
Contact: scholarships@mu.ac.zm
